intended_use: The IRIS Intelligent Retinal Imaging Systems is a comprehensive web-based software system application intended for use in storing, managing, and displaying patient data, diagnostic data and images fro
intended_use_full: The IRIS Intelligent Retinal Imaging Systems is a comprehensive web-based software system application intended for use in storing, managing, and displaying patient data, diagnostic data and images from computerized diagnostic instruments or systems. Original and color amplified images can be viewed by trained healthcare professionals.
target_condition: Diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, macular edema, dry age-related macular degeneration, wet age-related macular degeneration, vein occlusion, hypertensive retinopathy, macular hole, epiretinal membrane, cataract
